notes:
## 2.5.0

## What's new

- **Rename kid phones** on the website (✎ Save name) — pick Maya / David from the list; device ID fills in; names stay on GitHub.
- **Home cleanup** — Settings + Quick Focus in the ⋮ menu; no Android Recents item; no todo banner / Quick Focus strip; Focus shows “No daily clock”; app labels stay one line.
- **Rest / lock screen** — no more giant Focus numbers; clear “5 minutes / 15 minutes…” ask buttons.
- **Settings stays open** — dangerous pages Back out instead of kicking you to the Steady lock; Make Steady my Home briefly allows Permission Manager.
- **Asks stay gone** — Approve / Deny / **Dismiss** (website + parent phone) close the queue so Refresh doesn’t bring them back.
- **Faster sync** — kid phone polls website rules and ask decisions about every 15 seconds; Refresh still applies immediately.

_Rename phones on the dashboard. Install on the kid phone, then Refresh after you Save & push._
